name: Kaival Brands Innovations Group, Inc.
business: We are engaged in the sale, marketing and distribution of electronic nicotine delivery system (ENDS) products, also known as e-cigarettes, in a variety of flavors. Until October of 2024, our primary source of revenue has been the Bidi Stick. Our current primary source of revenue is through an international licensing agreement with Philip Morris Products S.A.
sellsTo: wholesalers and retailers of ENDS products

exposures.sentence: We are engaged in the sale, marketing and distribution of electronic nicotine delivery system (ENDS) products, also known as e-cigarettes, in a variety of flavors.
In May 2023 we acquired 19 existing and 47 pending patents with novel technologies related to vaporization and inhalation technologies from GoFire.

catalysts.event: RJ Reynolds Entities filed patent infringement complaint with ITC against Bidi and us
catalysts.sentence: On June 11, 2024, RAI Strategic Holdings, Inc., R.J. Reynolds Vapor Company, R.J. Reynolds Tobacco Company, and RAI Services Company (collectively, the RJ Reynolds Entities) filed a patent infringement complaint with the International Trade Commission (the ITC) against Bidi, us, and forty (40) other respondents (the ITC Complaint) pursuant to Section 337 of the Tariff Act of 1930, as amended.

catalysts.event: Company was dismissed from ITC proceeding
catalysts.sentence: On July 17, 2024, the Company was dismissed from the ITC proceeding and is no longer a defendant in the ITC proceeding.

catalysts.event: Bidi stipulated to consent order prohibiting import/sale of Bidi Stick; ITC entered order
catalysts.sentence: On November 1, 2024, Bidi stipulated to a consent order prohibiting Bidi from selling for import, importing, or selling after importation the Bidi Stick. The ITC entered the consent order on December 6, 2024, agreeing to cease all importation and distribution of the Bidi Stick until the RJ Reynolds Entities patent expires in October 2026.

catalysts.event: ALJ issued initial determination finding infringement
catalysts.sentence: The initial determination (ID) from the ALJ was issued on August 29, 2025. The ALJ found that violation of 337 based on infringement of U.S. Patent No. 11,925,202 by the respondents, and that both the technical and economic prongs of domestic industry were satisfied.

catalysts.event: PMPSA notified discontinuation of 2ml products licensing
catalysts.sentence: On December 16, 2024, KBI and Bidi received a letter from PMPSA that notified us of their intention to discontinue the licensing agreement of their 2ml products due to the lack of profitability and the analysis that it would likely not turn profitable.

catalysts.event: FDA issued MDO for non-tobacco flavored Bidi Sticks
catalysts.sentence: On November 4, 2025, FDA issued a MDO for the PMTA for the non-tobacco flavored Bidi Sticks.

catalysts.event: Commission target deadline for ITC final determination
catalysts.sentence: The Commission target deadline was November 24, 2025, subject to potential extensions.
